guilds.name: The Indigenous Plants
guilds.note: Heavily shaded from the west by neighbours barn. One of the cherry trees is old and tall. The other is a few years old, good rootstock candidate to graft on.

guilds.name: Old Mix 2
guilds.note: the peach, unknown cultivar, actually died out and a new branch started growing bellow the cut

guilds.name: Karmelitska Reneta i Kupine
guilds.note: The apple is extremely tall and I had to add scaffolding, as it has 4-5 fruits right at the top.
